name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Translate on-screen video text into any language without touching the original visuals.
problem: Businesses distributing video content globally face a costly, time-consuming process of recreating or re-editing visuals whenever text needs localizing. Redoing graphics, titles, and on-screen text frame by frame wastes production resources and slows time-to-market. Visual Translate automates this by detecting and replacing text elements in video while preserving the underlying visuals intact.
useCases: Localize product demo videos for international markets without rebuilding slide graphics
Translate training or onboarding videos into multiple languages for global employee rollouts
Adapt marketing video campaigns with region-specific text overlays at scale
Convert subtitle and on-screen label content for e-learning courses across language markets
